reviews.review_description: No longer launches on Oculus Go.
Best VR experience I have had. On a whole new level.

This game has kept me coming back again and again to try different characters. As well as different orders of doing quests. The quests I compleat each time seem to be different almost as if I miss some each game. I am wondering if there is a full list of quests so I can make sure I complete them all?

The game is worth the asking price as it makes good use of VR and offers a large amount of game play.

reviews.review_title: Ok but let down by Go Controller
reviews.review_description: I just stopped playing in frustration because it seems the forward movement only works about 50% of the time. I don't know why and this is on a fairly new headset and controller.
Great rpg, beautiful to behold and fun to play.

Just finished this game! im on the samsung 7edge gear. worked perfectly! graphics and visuals were all the best. this is a must download. game took me about 6 hours to complete. not all in one day of course. but it was worth the money. great job devs!!! give us more!!
Finally!  A turned based dungeon fantasy free roaming game for the Oculus Go!  Thanks!
I would honestly give this a 5 star rating if it weren’t for the HORRIBLE oculus go controls. It basically makes the game unplayable. Other that this issue, it is a fantastic game!

This game is gorgeous. But it is impossible to play with the oculus go controller. Moving forward is next to impossible. It sounds like people have better luck with a third-party controller but I don’t think you should be force to buy one just to play this game.
Amazing game. So much love has gone into this. Reminds me of playing D and D!

This game is great on the oculus go. TRULY STUNNING graphics, and although the map was a bit repetitive, it was huge and there is lots to explore. Wish there were more games like this. It would've been awesome if there were more upgrades for the heroes (max level is at 8 which is really easy to get to) and if the game was longer!

My first turn base role playing game on oculus.
 And this is good.
I love this game. At first I was u sure about it. But I love the graphics and story line. I’m stuck on how to find the spear for the statue. I can’t move forward from here. Any suggestions?
Crashes right after your choose your character.  Is there a fix for this? Noticed others this month have the same problem. Don't buy until they fix it,  trying to get a refund is difficult.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! 

Thank you for your patience! ☺ We released an update to The Well today. Please make sure you are on a stable internet connection before starting the update. When you load The Well with your GearVR on, you should receive a prompt to update. After clicking on "update", please remain connected to the internet during the download process. 

If you uninstalled The Well, you do not have to install an update after you download the game again. Please let us know if this works for you or if you have any additional questions.

reviews.review_title: Does not work on the oculus quest
reviews.review_description: I'm sure this is a great game, but after buying i tried to sideload on my quest and upon starting it fails the entitlement check, even though I've bought it. That's garbage and thats why I gave this 1 star. Can't even refund wtf.

It's the best game I've played by the time in my go, great graphics and sound. I would add a few things:

- More missions (I finish the game in 2 days, of course because of the quarantine, but still short for an rpg) 
- More Items. 
- Difficulty level, I found it quite easy to complete.
- More levels (there's only 8, which you can easely achieve in one day) and more abilities. 
- More companions, or more and different companion attacks, to make it more entertaining.

Thanks for making this, it worth every cent, but if you upgrade simple things like the above ones, paying double the price would be still a good price.
Game crashes whenever I start a new game. Instantly fails once the intro cutscene is over. Playing on a Galaxy s10e. Would love to try the game out, please fix.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! 

Thank you for your patience! ☺ We released an update to The Well today. Please make sure you are on a stable internet connection before starting the update. When you load The Well with your GearVR on, you should receive a prompt to update. After clicking on "update", please remain connected to the internet during the download process. 

If you uninstalled The Well, you do not have to install an update after you download the game again. Please let us know if this works for you or if you have any additional questions.

reviews.review_description: I loved the game and the ending was really cool. I still wonder if there is a mission for the bottom right slot as I walked through the game fully twice and found nothing. There were a few too many enemy's while you walk around and became a little too repetative but with all that said it is still my second favorite game right behind eclipse.

Awesome rpg game for gear vr, not so many of this type to chose from, its worth every penny, the only downsides are enemy variety, could use some skill synergy, and a bit more complex character development(stats and such). Overall a great game, hope they make another one like this.
Pretty standard fair as far as RPGs go but I was only going to check it out for a few mins and several hours later it was lunch one. It’s no nethack. I hope they add more items skills and classes.
